expectations.text: Includes firmographics, goals, pains, objections, buying triggers, watering holes, and decision role
expectations.evidence: All seven sections present and labeled: Firmographics, Decision role, Goals, Pains, Objections, Buying triggers, Watering holes.

expectations.text: Explicitly flags the ICP as a hypothesis pending real customer evidence
expectations.evidence: Opening line: 'This ICP is a hypothesis — built on inference, not your customer data. Validate it against your actual best customers.'
Delivers first, then asks one sharpening question ('who are your 5 happiest paying customers') — within the optional allowance.
